rationale: Smoke test (M2) passed on 2026-05-13 15:21Z. Resuming full-course generation. M1 + M2 already produced. Planning M3-M12. This run targets M3-M6 (Differentiation: composite/implicit/inverse + Contextual apps + Analytical apps a/b). Next run resumes from M7.

modules_planned_this_run.title: Composite, Implicit & Inverse Derivatives
common_traps: Forgetting the chain rule on nested composites
Sign errors in implicit differentiation when isolating dy/dx

modules_planned_this_run.title: Contextual Applications of Differentiation
common_traps: Forgetting units in real-world rate problems
Setting up related rates with wrong variable relationships
Misapplying L'Hospital's Rule outside indeterminate forms (0/0 or infinity/infinity)

modules_planned_this_run.title: MVT, EVT, and the Derivative Tests
common_traps: Confusing critical points with extrema (every extremum is a CP, not vice versa)
Forgetting MVT hypotheses (continuous on [a,b] AND differentiable on (a,b))
Forgetting endpoint checks in candidates test

modules_planned_this_run.title: Graph Sketching, Optimization & Implicit Behavior
common_traps: Optimization: forgetting to verify max vs min via second-derivative or boundary check
Mismatching f, f', f'' signs when sketching
Failing to apply constraint to reduce to one variable in optimization

modules_deferred_to_future_runs.title: AP Exam Synthesis and FRQ Strategy
